retrieved_result: How much does a decent piano keyboard cost? Rich Coogan, I play and program all kinds of keyboard instruments. Answered Jul 20, 2015 · Author has 204 answers and 215.6k answer views You can find them in all price ranges, and you can find good stuff for lesser prices on Craigslist. As for brand new, expect to spend between $1000 and $2000. I h
